Person Signing this Report on Behalf of Reporting Manager: Name: Peter R. LaTronica Title: Vice President, Chief Compliance Officer Phone: 203-226-3030 Signature, Place, and Date of Signing: /s/ Peter LaTronica Westport, CT May 22, 2006 ---------------------- ------------- ------------ [Signature] [City, State] [Date] THIS FILING AMENDS THE FORM 13F FILED ON MAY 16, 2006 IN ORDER TO AMEND THE HOLDINGS ENTRIES LISTED ON SUCH FORM 13F. THIS FILING LISTS SECURITIES HOLDINGS ORIGINALLY REPORTED ON THE FORM 13F FILED ON MAY 5, 2006 PURSUANT TO A REQUEST FOR CONFIDENTIAL TREATMENT.
